body_excerpt: In xfrm_state_fini and related functions of xfrm_state.c and related files, there is a possible way to corrupt memory due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
